title: West Ham have fresh hope - but Spurs now in uncharted territory
summary: West Ham's commanding victory over Wolves bolsters their Premier League survival prospects while leaving Tottenham in unprecedented relegation danger. The result dramatically shifts the dynamics of the bottom-half battle.
content: West Ham's thumping win over Wolves not only boosts their own Premier League survival hopes, but plunges Tottenham into the drop zone - and to new depths.

title: Augsburg miss late penalty in tense  Hoffenheim draw

title: Why Ross County are facing back-to-back relegations
summary: Ross County face an uphill battle to avoid a second consecutive relegation from Scotland's top flight this season. With games running out and their team struggling under manager Stuart Kettlewell, Friday's match against Queen's Park is critical to their survival hopes. This marks a dramatic decline for a club desperate to maintain its top-flight status.
content: Ross County seek a reaction away to Queen's Park on Friday but Stuart Kettlewell's side are running out of games to avoid a second successive relegation.

zh.title: 为什么罗斯郡面临连续两个赛季的降级
zh.summary: 罗斯郡面临着艰难的局面，希望在本赛季避免连续第二次从苏格兰顶级联赛降级。随着比赛越来越少，球队在主教练斯图尔特·凯特韦尔的带领下陷入困境，周五与皇后公园队的比赛对球队的生存希望至关重要。这标志着这家俱乐部遭遇了戏剧性的衰落，他们渴望保持顶级联赛的地位。

title: What is Scotland's most iconic goal? This week - McTominay v Law
summary: BBC Football is hosting a public poll to determine Scotland's greatest goal, with this week's matchup featuring Scott McTominay against Denis Law. The series allows fans to celebrate and debate iconic moments in Scottish football history. The winning goal will be crowned as the nation's most memorable achievement.
content: Vote to find out what goal will be crowned Scotland's greatest.

zh.title: 苏格兰最具标志性的进球是什么？本周——麦克托米奈对战劳
zh.summary: BBC足球频道正在进行一项公众投票，以确定苏格兰最伟大的进球，本周的对阵是斯科特·麦克托米奈对阵丹尼斯·劳。该系列允许球迷庆祝和讨论苏格兰足球历史上的标志性时刻。获胜的进球将被冠以国家最难忘的成就之名。

title: FPL talking point: Is it time to use wildcard?
summary: Fantasy Premier League managers face a key strategic decision about when to deploy their wildcard chip as the league returns this weekend with two double gameweeks ahead. The timing of this move could significantly impact final season standings. Managers must decide whether to use it immediately or wait until gameweek 33.
content: The Premier League returns this weekend and with two double gameweeks on the horizon, the big question: Do you play the wildcard now or hold off until gameweek 33?

zh.title: 幻想超级联赛讨论点：是时候使用外卡了吗？
zh.summary: 幻想超级联赛经理们面临着一个关键的战略决定，即何时部署他们的外卡芯片，因为联赛本周末回归，接下来有两个双比赛周。这一举动的时机可能会显著影响最终的赛季排名。经理们必须决定是立即使用它还是等到第33周。

title: 'You need to have arrogance' - Rooney and Littler on being number one
summary: Wayne Rooney and darts world number one Luke Littler discuss the elite mindset required to succeed and handle pressure after being thrust into the spotlight at young ages. Both athletes reflect on the mental toughness and arrogance needed to maintain top performance. Their conversation explores what separates champions from competitors in their respective sports.
content: Wayne Rooney and Luke Littler both know what it is like to be thrust into the limelight at a young age.

zh.title: "你需要有傲气" - Rooney和Littler谈论成为第一名
zh.summary: 足球明星Wayne Rooney和飞镖世界第一Luke Littler讨论在年轻时被推入聚光灯后成功和处理压力所需的精英心态。两位运动员反思了维持顶级表现所需的心理韧性和傲气。他们的对话探讨了在各自运动中将冠军与竞争对手区分开来的因素。

title: Littler v Rooney in nine-dart challenge
summary: Darts world number one Luke Littler competes against former England football star Wayne Rooney in a nine-dart challenge, blending two of Britain's most prominent sports. The event showcases both athletes' competitive spirit and athletic prowess in an entertainment format. The matchup appeals to fans across both football and darts communities.
content: Darts world number one Luke Littler takes on Wayne Rooney in a nine-dart challenge.

zh.title: Littler对阵Rooney的九飞镖挑战赛
zh.summary: 飞镖世界第一Luke Littler与英格兰足球明星Wayne Rooney在九飞镖挑战赛中竞争,融合了英国两项最突出的运动。该赛事以娱乐形式展现了两位运动员的竞争精神和运动能力。这场比赛吸引了足球和飞镖社区的球迷。

title: The Wayne Rooney Show
summary: A series featuring Wayne Rooney and Luke Littler explores the pressure, risk, and elite mentality required to compete at the highest levels of sport. The show provides insight into how two of Britain's most successful athletes handle the demands and expectations of their professions. Viewers gain perspective on what drives top competitors and shapes their mentality.
content: Wayne meets Luke Littler: pressure, risk, rivalry and elite mentality.

zh.title: 韦恩·鲁尼秀
zh.summary: 由Wayne Rooney和Luke Littler主演的系列节目探讨了在最高水平竞争所需的压力、风险和精英心态。该节目深入了解英国两位最成功的运动员如何应对职业需求和期望。观众了解是什么驱动顶级竞争对手并塑造他们的心态。

title: The Premier League winner fighting for League Two survival
summary: Christian Fuchs, famous for winning the Premier League with Leicester City's historic 2015-16 title, is now fighting to keep Newport County in League Two. The sharp contrast between his past glory and current struggle highlights football's unpredictable career trajectories. Fuchs' battle for fourth-tier survival underscores how quickly fortunes can change in professional football.
content: Christian Fuchs is most famous for winning the Premier League with Leicester City. Now he is battling to keep Newport County in League Two.

zh.title: 英超冠军争夺英乙级联赛生存权
zh.summary: 曾随莱斯特城赢得2015-16赛季英超冠军的克里斯蒂安·富克斯,如今正为纽波特郡在英乙级联赛的生存而战。他过去的荣耀与当前的困境形成鲜明对比,凸显了足球职业生涯的不可预测性。富克斯争夺四级联赛生存权的经历突出了职业足球中财富变化的迅速。

title: FIFA adds new, more expensive, WC ticket tiers
summary: FIFA has introduced new premium ticket tiers for the World Cup with prices reaching $4,105 for front-row seats at marquee matches, including the U.S. opener against Paraguay on June 12 in Inglewood. The higher pricing structure raises accessibility concerns for average fans at one of sports' biggest events. These premium offerings reflect FIFA's strategy to maximize revenue from top matches.
content: FIFA added new, even more expensive tiers of tickets for this year's World Cup, asking up to $4,105 for a front category 1 seat at the U.S. opener against Paraguay in Inglewood, California, on June 12.

zh.title: 国际足联推出更昂贵的世界杯门票等级
zh.summary: 国际足联为世界杯推出了新的高级门票等级,热门比赛的前排座位价格高达4105美元,包括美国队6月12日在英格尔伍德对阵巴拉圭的揭幕战。更高的票价结构引发了对普通球迷在体育界最大赛事之一中的可获取性的担忧。这些高端产品反映了国际足联通过顶级比赛最大化收入的策略。

title: Source: Cincinnati looking into move for Neymar
summary: FC Cincinnati is exploring options to bring Neymar from Santos to MLS, according to ESPN sources. This represents the latest effort by an MLS club to attract a global soccer icon. Neymar's potential arrival would mark a significant statement for the growing league.
content: Neymar has emerged as the latest global soccer icon to draw interest from MLS, as FC Cincinnati started exploring options to bring the Santos star to the United States, a source told ESPN's Nathalia Ferrão.

zh.title: 来源：辛辛那提寻求引进内马尔
zh.summary: 据ESPN消息源称，FC辛辛那提正在探索从桑托斯引进内马尔加入MLS的可能性。这是MLS俱乐部吸引全球足球巨星的最新努力。内马尔的潜在加入将标志着这个不断发展的联赛的一个重要声明。

title: Auburn, Texas A&M to host Argentina before WC
summary: Argentina, led by Lionel Messi, will play two 2026 World Cup warm-up matches in the United States on June 6 against Honduras at Texas A&M and June 9 against Iceland at Auburn. The matches serve as final preparations for the three-time World Cup champions before the tournament. These games provide crucial momentum-building opportunities ahead of the competition.
content: Lionel Messi and three-time World Cup champions Argentina will play two 2026 World Cup warm-up games in the United States -- the first on June 6 vs. Honduras at Texas A&M and the second on June 9 vs. Iceland at Auburn.

zh.title: 奥本大学和德州农工大学将在世界杯前主办阿根廷
zh.summary: 由莱昂内尔·梅西领导的阿根廷将在美国参加两场2026年世界杯热身赛，6月6日在德州农工大学对阵洪都拉斯，6月9日在奥本大学对阵冰岛。这些比赛是三次世界杯冠军在锦标赛前的最后准备。这些比赛为即将到来的赛事提供了至关重要的积累势头的机会。

title: Watkins delivers halftime wakeup call in Villa win
summary: Ollie Watkins delivered a crucial halftime motivational speech that helped spark Aston Villa's dominant 3-1 victory over Bologna in the Europa League quarter-final first leg. His leadership on the pitch matched his words, with Villa controlling the second half. The win gives Villa a commanding advantage heading into the return leg.
content: Ollie Watkins said he had to give his Aston Villa teammates a halftime wakeup call en route to their 3-1 first-leg Europa League quarter-final victory over Bologna.

zh.title: 沃特金斯在维拉胜利中送出中场警醒
zh.summary: 奥利·沃特金斯在中场传递的关键激励演讲帮助激励阿斯顿维拉在欧联杯四分之一决赛首回合中以3-1的优势击败博洛尼亚。他在球场上的领导力与他的言辞相辅相成，维拉控制了下半场。这场胜利使维拉在主客场淘汰赛中处于明显的优势地位。

title: Palace enjoy 'special' night with rout of Fiorentina
summary: Crystal Palace secured a commanding 3-0 victory over Fiorentina at Selhurst Park in the Conference League quarterfinal first leg. Manager Oliver Glasner praised the special atmosphere created by the home crowd that fueled the team's dominant performance. Palace's decisive win gives them a strong position for the return match.
content: Oliver Glasner said he could feel "something special" at Selhurst Park as Crystal Palace secured a 3-0 victory over Fiorentina in the first leg of their Conference League quarterfinal.

zh.title: 水晶宫大胜佛罗伦萨，度过"特殊"夜晚
zh.summary: 水晶宫在欧洲协会杯四分之一决赛首回合中以3-0击败佛罗伦萨。主帅格拉瑟赞扬了主场球迷营造的特殊氛围激励球队的统治性表现。水晶宫的决定性胜利为他们在第二回合奠定了坚实基础。

title: Porto howler gifts Forest hope after UEL first leg
summary: Nottingham Forest escaped Porto's Estádio do Dragão with a 1-1 draw in their Europa League quarterfinal first leg, aided by a comical own goal from the home side. The draw keeps Forest's European hopes alive heading into the second leg. The result represents a valuable away point for the English club.
content: Nottingham Forest's Europa League hopes remain intact after a comical own goal helped them get out of their quarterfinal first leg at FC Porto with a 1-1 draw.

zh.title: 波尔图失误为森林队带来希望
zh.summary: 诺丁汉森林队在欧联杯四分之一决赛首回合中在对手的乌龙球帮助下，在龙球场以1-1打成平手。这个平局使森林队的欧洲希望继续保持。这个结果为英超球队争得了宝贵的客场平局。
